contract.rental_notice: <Notice> This is a rental agreement with recurring payments. You will be charged the specified amount on a regular basis. The property ownership remains with Dynasty 8 Real Estate, and you will have usage rights for the agreed period. Rental can be terminated according to the terms outlined in this agreement.

contract.payment_method_full_payment: <Underline>Full Payment</Underline> — Pay the complete amount immediately. No interest charges or additional fees. Immediate property ownership.

header.agreement_notice: This agreement is entered into between Dynasty 8 Real Estate and <Bold>{{firstname}} {{lastname}}</Bold> for the <Bold>{{rental_or_purchase}}</Bold> of the property located at the address specified above.

sign.description: By signing below, I acknowledge that I have read and agree to all terms and conditions outlined in this agreement.

location.shell_description: Define the shell coords, When the player wanted to enter the house he'll teleport to this coords.

location.board_description: Define the board coords, When the player wanted to interact with the board he'll teleport to this coords.
location.entry_description: Define the entry coords, When the player wanted to enter the house he'll teleport to this coords.
location.garage_description: Define the garage coords, When the player wanted to enter the garage he'll teleport to this coords.
